auth.errorRetry: Kripya thodi der baad try karein.
auth.subtitle: Apni family ki health ka dhyan rakhein, asani se.

onboarding.selectCondition: Kaun si condition manage kar rahe hain?
onboarding.addMedicinesLater: Baad mein bhi kar sakte hain.
onboarding.conditionSubtitle: Aapki condition chunein taaki hum sahi tracking set kar sakein.
onboarding.firstReadingSubtitle: Apne glucometer se reading dekhein aur neeche type karein.
onboarding.celebrateSubtitle: Bahut acche! Aapne apni pehli reading log kar li. 🎉

dashboard.staleData: Purana data dikh raha hai — pull to refresh.
dashboard.noReadings: Koi reading nahi — abhi log karein.
dashboard.welcomeBackBody: {{days}} din ho gaye — naya streak shuru karein 💪

logging.profileLine: {{profile}} ke liye save ho raha hai
logging.recentSwitchConfirm: Yeh {{profile}} ke liye hai — sahi hai?
logging.extremeConfirm: {{value}} — yeh bahut {{direction}} hai. Kya sahi hai?
logging.savedOffline: Locally save ho gaya — internet aane par sync ho jaayega.
logging.saveFailed: Save nahi ho paya — data locally safe hai, sync baad mein hoga.
logging.festiveHint: Festival hai? Toggle karein. Is hafte: {{used}}/{{max}}
logging.festiveLimitReached: Is hafte 2 baar use ho chuka. Kal se phir available hoga.
logging.savingForProfile: {{name}} ji ke liye save ho raha hai
logging.savingDefault: Aapke liye save ho raha hai
logging.recentSwitchWarning: Abhi-abhi profile switch kiya — sahi profile hai na?
logging.extremeBannerHigh: Yeh bahut zyada hai. Kya sahi hai?
logging.extremeBannerLow: Yeh bahut kam hai. Kya sahi hai?
logging.festiveAvailableHint: Festival din tag karein ({{used}}/{{max}} is hafte)

feedback.firstReading: Pehli reading! {{value}} mg/dL save ho gaya.
feedback.festiveSkip: Festival hai! Enjoy karein. Kal se phir track karenge.

medications.title: Dawai
medications.saveFailed: Save nahi hua. Dobara try karein.

critical.lowBody: Abhi kuch meetha khayein — juice, glucose, mithai. Agar chakkar aa rahe hain to turant {{contact}} ko call karein.
critical.highBody: Pani peeyein. Dawai li hai check karein. {{contact}} ko call karein.
critical.alertBodyLow: Abhi kuch meetha khayein — juice, glucose, mithai.
critical.alertBodyHigh: Paani peeyein. Dawai li hai check karein.

offline.banner: Offline mode — readings safe hain, sync baad mein hoga

maintenance.title: Thodi der ruk jaiye
maintenance.fallback: App abhi maintenance mein hai. Thodi der baad try karein.

timeAnomaly.banner: Phone ka time galat lag raha hai. Settings mein automatic time on karein — warna streak sahi count nahi hoga.

profileSelector.title: Kaun log kar raha hai?
profileSelector.subtitle: Sahi profile chunein — taki reading sahi user ke liye save ho.

bp.title: BP log karein
bp.saveFailed: Save nahi ho paya — dobara try karein.
bp.savedOffline: Locally save ho gaya — sync hone par update hoga.
bp.invalidPair: Upper, lower se zyada hona chahiye.
bp.highBanner: BP thoda zyada hai — paani peeyein, aaram karein.

meals.title: Aaj kya khaya?
meals.subtitle: Quick log — bas tap karein.
meals.saveFailed: Save nahi hua — phir try karein.
meals.noMealsToday: Aaj abhi tak koi meal log nahi hua.

insights.title: Patterns
insights.lockedBody: 14 din baad apke real patterns dikhne lagenge. Bas regular log karte rahein — abhi tak {{stage}} din complete!
insights.empty: Abhi koi pattern nahi mila — log karte rahein.
insights.loadFailed: Insights load nahi huye — pull to refresh.

spike.mild: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam {{baseline}} se thodi zyada hai. Chinta ki baat nahi — bas log karte rahein.
spike.significant: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam {{baseline}} se kaafi zyada hai. Thoda paani peeyein aur aaram karein, aur agli doctor visit mein zaroor batayein.
spike.severe: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam {{baseline}} se bahut zyada hai. Jaldi doctor se baat karein.

trend.slow: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) sugar pichhle {{windowDays}} din mein dheere-dheere $t(insights.direction.{{direction}}). Log karte rahein taaki hum dhyaan rakh sakein.
trend.notable: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) sugar pichhle {{windowDays}} din se lagataar $t(insights.direction.{{direction}}). Is par dhyaan dein aur doctor se share karein.
trend.rapid: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) sugar pichhle {{windowDays}} din mein tezi se $t(insights.direction.{{direction}}). Jaldi doctor se baat karein.

anomaly.low: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam range se kam hai. Agar kamzori ya chakkar lage to kuch meetha khayein aur aaram karein.
anomaly.high: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam range se zyada hai. Thoda paani peeyein aur doctor ko batayein.
anomaly.extreme_low: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam range se bahut neeche hai. Abhi kuch meetha khayein aur doctor se baat karein.
anomaly.extreme_high: Aapki $t(insights.readingType.{{readingType}}) reading {{value}} aapke aam range se bahut zyada hai. Paani peeyein aur jaldi doctor se baat karein.

meal_correlation.info: Jab aap $t(insights.mealCategory.{{mealCategory}}) khaate hain, aapki sugar thodi zyada rehti hai — lagbhag {{categoryMean}}, aam se kareeb {{delta}} mg/dL upar. Bas dhyaan mein rakhein.
meal_correlation.warn: Jab aap $t(insights.mealCategory.{{mealCategory}}) khaate hain, aapki sugar zyada rehti hai — lagbhag {{categoryMean}}, aam se kareeb {{delta}} mg/dL upar. Thoda kam matra mein khana madad kar sakta hai.
meal_correlation.critical: Jab aap $t(insights.mealCategory.{{mealCategory}}) khaate hain, aapki sugar bahut zyada ho jaati hai — lagbhag {{categoryMean}}, aam se kareeb {{delta}} mg/dL upar. Apne khaane ke baare mein doctor se baat karein.

cross_condition.info: Jis din aapka BP zyada hota hai ({{systolicThreshold}} se upar), us din sugar bhi thodi zyada rehti hai — lagbhag {{highBpMean}}, normal din {{normalBpMean}}. Dono par saath dhyaan dein.
cross_condition.warn: Jis din aapka BP zyada hota hai ({{systolicThreshold}} se upar), us din sugar bhi zyada rehti hai — lagbhag {{highBpMean}}, normal din {{normalBpMean}} (kareeb {{delta}} mg/dL zyada). Yeh baat doctor ko zaroor batayein.
cross_condition.critical: Jis din aapka BP zyada hota hai ({{systolicThreshold}} se upar), us din sugar bahut zyada rehti hai — lagbhag {{highBpMean}}, normal din {{normalBpMean}} (kareeb {{delta}} mg/dL zyada). BP aur sugar dono ko saath manage karne ke liye doctor se baat karein.

hba1c.title: HbA1c estimate
hba1c.learnMore: Yeh sirf estimate hai — doctor se lab test confirm karein.

voice.statusNoPermission: Microphone permission chahiye — settings me allow karein.
voice.statusError: Voice mein dikkat hai — numpad use karein.
voice.exampleHint: Boliye: "sugar 120" ya "meri sugar ek sau bees hai"
voice.devBuildRequired: Voice ke liye dev build chahiye — abhi numpad use karein.

errorBoundary.title: Kuch gadbad hui 😔
errorBoundary.body: App mein technical dikkat aayi hai. Aapka data safe hai — kuch nahi khoya.
errorBoundary.hint: Agar dikkat ho rahi hai, phone restart karein.

family.title: Parivar
family.subtitle: Apne guardian ya patient ke saath connect karein.
family.inviteHint: Guardian ka phone number — wo pehle app install kar lein.
family.inviteForProfile: 👤 {{name}} ji ke liye guardian invite kar rahe hain
family.inviteFailed: Invite nahi ja paya — phone number check karein.
family.revokeConfirm: Access hatayein? Yeh wapas restore kar sakte hain.
family.pendingFromYou: Aapne invite kiya — wait kar rahe hain
